category_sources: source_facts.description says draws signalling charts from textual description; official Msc-generator manual says it parses textual chart descriptions and outputs graphics for message sequence charts, graphs, and block diagrams
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msc-generator; official manual uses Msc-generator
docs_sources: Official GitLab Pages manual is the dedicated documentation surface for Msc-generator
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitLab project and official manual links to the same GitLab project for downloads
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official manual identify textual chart generation, message sequence charts, Graphviz graphs, and command-line usage
